/CAL:APD MOTION TO TRANSFER PROBATION TO SOLANO COUNTY PURSUANT TO 1203,9PC/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION BE TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SOLANO COUNTY/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/

/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 38D/CTS:38/DNACOMP/WS/VF4:240/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:COMPLIANCE WITH APD REHAB PROGRAM/CTORD:AFTER 18 MONTHS IF IN FULL COMPLIANCE WITH PROBATION TERMS OF ENROLLED IN SCHOOL AND EMPLOYED FULL TIME, HE MAY APPLY FOR PC 17(B)/SA2:MCALLISTER AND FILLMORE STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO/SA3:AND STAY OUT OF SAN FRANCISCO UNLESS COMING INTOTHE CITY TO THE  ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT, SAN FRANCISCO/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/
